text: Produce a shippable, recorded demo of Bowman's autonomous discoverâ†’planâ†’executeâ†’verify loop
description: The core deliverable. Reuse the PL Genesis autonomy work (2b76f62f cluster: animator state machine, session memory, autonomous execution loop) to produce ONE clean, reproducible end-to-end run that a stranger can watch and believe is autonomous: agent discovers an aim, plans, executes with real tools, verifies, and reports. Capture it as a short screen recording + a written run log (agent_log.json already exists). This is the artifact every other BuilderShip sub-aim depends on, and it has standalone value as a Aimparency demo regardless of the hackathon.

status.comment: Highest-leverage item: the demo gates the public showcase.
